text: Stay Hungry, Stay Foolish.
author: Steve Jobs

text: Innovation distinguishes between a leader and a follower.
author: Steve Jobs

text: Design is not just what it looks like and feels like. Design is how it works.
author: Steve Jobs

text: The people who are crazy enough to think they can change the world are the ones who do.
author: Steve Jobs

text: Your time is limited, so don't waste it living someone else's life.
author: Steve Jobs

text: Be a yardstick of quality. Some people aren't used to an environment where excellence is expected.
author: Steve Jobs

text: I want to put a ding in the universe.
author: Steve Jobs

text: Sometimes when you innovate, you make mistakes. It is best to admit them quickly, and get on with improving your other innovations.
author: Steve Jobs

text: Creativity is just connecting things. When you ask creative people how they did something, they feel a little guilty because they didn't really do it, they just saw something.
author: Steve Jobs

text: Simple can be harder than complex: You have to work hard to get your thinking clean to make it simple. But it's worth it in the end because once you get there, you can move mountains.
author: Steve Jobs

text: My job is not to be easy on people. My job is to take these great people we have and to push them and make them even better.
author: Steve Jobs

text: I'm convinced that about half of what separates successful entrepreneurs from the non-successful ones is pure perseverance.
author: Steve Jobs

text: Getting fired from Apple was the best thing that could have ever happened to me. The heaviness of being successful was replaced by the lightness of being a beginner again, less sure about everything. It freed me to enter one of the most creative periods of my life.
author: Steve Jobs

text: Remembering that you are going to die is the best way I know to avoid the trap of thinking you have something to lose. You are already naked. There is no reason not to follow your heart.
author: Steve Jobs

text: Innovation comes from people meeting in the hallways or calling each other at 10:30 at night with a new idea, or because they realized something that shoots holes in how we've been thinking about a problem.
author: Steve Jobs

text: Design is the fundamental soul of a human-made creation that ends up expressing itself in successive outer layers of the product or service.
author: Steve Jobs

text: Management is about persuading people to do things they do not want to do, while leadership is about inspiring people to do things they never thought they could do.
author: Steve Jobs

text: Being the richest man in the cemetery doesn't matter to me. Going to bed at night saying we've done something wonderful, that's what matters to me.
author: Steve Jobs

text: You can't connect the dots looking forward; you can only connect them looking backward. So you have to trust that the dots will somehow connect in your future.
author: Steve Jobs

text: Have the courage to follow your heart and intuition. They somehow already know what you truly want to become. Everything else is secondary.
author: Steve Jobs

text: Let's go invent tomorrow rather than worrying about what happened yesterday.
author: Steve Jobs

text: Innovation has nothing to do with how many R&D dollars you have.
author: Steve Jobs

text: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
author: Steve Jobs

text: I think the things you most regret in life are the things you didn't do.
author: Steve Jobs

text: Great things in business are never done by one person. They're done by a team of people.
author: Steve Jobs

text: We're here to put a dent in the universe. Otherwise why else even be here?
author: Steve Jobs

text: I'm as proud of many of the things we haven't done as the things we have done.
author: Steve Jobs

text: Innovation is saying no to a thousand things.
author: Steve Jobs

text: It’s not a faith in technology. It’s faith in people.
author: Steve Jobs

text: Technology is nothing. What's important is that you have a faith in people, that they're basically good and smart.
author: Steve Jobs

text: Details matter, it’s worth waiting to get it right.
author: Steve Jobs

text: Simplicity is the ultimate sophistication.
author: Steve Jobs

text: Most people make the mistake of thinking design is what it looks like.
author: Steve Jobs

text: We made the buttons on the screen look so good you'll want to lick them.
author: Steve Jobs

text: It takes a lot of hard work to make something simple, to truly understand the underlying challenges and come up with elegant solutions.
author: Steve Jobs

text: Design is a funny word. Some people think design means how it looks. But of course, if you dig deeper, it's really how it works.
author: Steve Jobs

text: The broader one's understanding of the human experience, the better design we will have.
author: Steve Jobs

text: Quality is more important than quantity. One home run is much better than two doubles.
author: Steve Jobs

text: In most people's vocabularies, design means veneer. It's interior decorating. It's the fabric of the curtains of the sofa. But to me, nothing could be further from the meaning of design.
author: Steve Jobs

text: Don't let the noise of others' opinions drown out your own inner voice.
author: Steve Jobs

text: If you haven't found it yet, keep looking. Don't settle. As with all matters of the heart, you'll know when you find it.
author: Steve Jobs

text: The only way to be truly satisfied is to do what you believe is great work.
author: Steve Jobs

text: Your work is going to fill a large part of your life, and the only way to be truly satisfied is to do what you believe is great work.
author: Steve Jobs

text: I think if you do something and it turns out pretty good, then you should go do something else wonderful, not dwell on it for too long.
author: Steve Jobs

text: You have to trust in something — your gut, destiny, life, karma, whatever.
author: Steve Jobs

text: Everything around you that you call life was made up by people that were no smarter than you.
author: Steve Jobs

text: You can change it, you can influence it… Once you learn that, you'll never be the same again.
author: Steve Jobs

text: Life can be much broader once you discover one simple fact: Everything around you that you call life was made up by people that were no smarter than you.
author: Steve Jobs

text: My model for business is The Beatles. They were four guys who kept each other's kind of negative tendencies in check.
author: Steve Jobs

text: They balanced each other and the total was greater than the sum of the parts.
author: Steve Jobs

text: That's how I see business: great things in business are never done by one person, they're done by a team of people.
author: Steve Jobs

text: It's not about pop culture, and it's not about fooling people, and it's not about convincing people that they want something they don't.
author: Steve Jobs

text: We figure out what we want. And I think we're pretty good at having the right discipline to think through whether a lot of other people are going to want it, too.
author: Steve Jobs

text: You can't ask customers what they want and then try to give that to them. By the time you get it built, they'll want something new.
author: Steve Jobs

text: Hire people who are better than you.
author: Steve Jobs

text: It doesn't make sense to hire smart people and tell them what to do; we hire smart people so they can tell us what to do.
author: Steve Jobs

text: A lot of times, people don't know what they want until you show it to them.
author: Steve Jobs

text: If you really look closely, most overnight successes took a long time.
author: Steve Jobs

text: You have to be burning with an idea, or a problem, or a wrong that you want to right.
author: Steve Jobs

text: If you're not passionate enough from the start, you'll never stick it out.
author: Steve Jobs

text: The people who are doing the work are the moving force at Apple. My job is to create a space for them.
author: Steve Jobs

text: I've had a lot of luck in my life, but I've also had a lot of failure. You have to be willing to fail.
author: Steve Jobs

text: If you're afraid of failing, you won't get very far.
author: Steve Jobs

text: Mistakes are a part of the process.
author: Steve Jobs

text: We don't get a chance to do that many things, and every one should be really excellent.
author: Steve Jobs

text: Because this is our life. Life is brief, and then you die, you know?
author: Steve Jobs

text: And we've all chosen to do this with our lives. So it better be damn good. It better be worth it.
author: Steve Jobs

text: Sometimes life hits you in the head with a brick. Don't lose faith.
author: Steve Jobs

text: The journey is the reward.
author: Steve Jobs

text: I want to make a contribution to the world by making tools for the mind that advance humankind.
author: Steve Jobs
